Favours are a lovely treat for your guests at their table place setting. Especially that they’re sweet too! Choose from iced biscuits, cupcakes and macarons.

Biscuits & cupcakes can be personalised. All our items are packaged in cellophane bags/ boxes and tied with satin ribbon to coordinate with your colour palette.
